purpose: Split before-and-after image showing beauty service result. Modest framing.

tone_descriptor.description: Tone direction: contemplative, bold, warm, dignified, kinetic, etc.

prompt_template: Side-by-side before-and-after split-screen of {service_area} showing clear transformation from {service_type} treatment, both images same lighting and angle for valid comparison, modest framing showing only treatment area (hands for nail, eyes for lash, profile for hair), soft natural daylight, hyper-realistic skin and result detail, no text overlay, no watermark {cultural_constraints_injection}
anti_patterns: Avoid in output: full face if not permitted
notes: Intents: grow, harvest. Source code in research corpus: B01. Saudi adaptation guidance: Critical Saudi beauty content category. Modest framing essential. Default nail and lash hands-only or eyes-only framing. Reference image: Required (actual before photo). Recommended frequency: 1-2 per week for beauty services. Compliance level: elevated.
